summary: A rectangular single-story building with a distinctive stepped pyramid roof. The structure features a stone brick foundation and base, wooden plank walls with five evenly-spaced window openings, and a dark nether brick or dark wood roof with a symmetrical stepped/tiered design. The building sits on a prepared dirt foundation with stone brick edging.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

elements: five rectangular windows with glass panes
stepped pyramid roof with multiple tiers
rebuild_hints: Create rectangular stone brick foundation approximately 12×10 blocks with 1-2 block height
Build wooden plank walls on foundation with 5 evenly-spaced window openings (approximately 2 blocks wide each)
Place glass panes in all window frames
Construct stepped pyramid roof using nether brick, starting with full-width base layer and stepping inward by 1 block per layer
Add fence posts at corners and between windows for structural detail
Ensure roof reaches approximately 4-5 blocks above wall height at peak
Surround building perimeter with stone brick edging on ground level
uncertainties: Exact interior height and floor details not visible
Precise window frame material (appears to be stone brick trim but could be other variants)
Whether roof is nether brick or dark oak wood - appears dark but exact block type uncertain
Exact dimensions difficult to determine without scale reference; estimates based on visual proportions
Interior layout and any internal structures completely unknown
